/CAL: SENTENCING DEPT 624, BEFORE JUDGE BRADSTREET/JAVS/X:DEFT'S MOT FOR NEW TRIAL DENIED/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2D/CTS:2/X:ATTEND AN ADDITIONAL 21 SESSIONS AT THE KAISER SAN RAFAEL EARLY RECOVERY GROUP OR THE KAISERRELAPSE PREVENTION GROUP, OR A COMBINATION OF BOTH, AND ATTENDANCE MUST BEAT LEAST 3 DAYSA WEEK, ADDITIONALLY DEFENDANT MUST ATTEND AT LEAST 10 CLASSES OR SESSIONS WITH NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS AT A LOCATION OF HIS CHOICE UPON COMPLETION OF THEADDITIONAL 21 SESSIONS, IF HE MISSES MORE THAN 2 SESSIONS IN EITHER THE EARLY RECOVERY GROUP OR NARCOTICS  ANONYMOUS HE SHALL BE ORDERED INTO A 3 MONTH HOUSE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:ALL POSITIVE RANDOMDRUG TESTING RESULTS MUST BE REPORTED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION/RESTPTD/PF39018/LF 18/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/LSUS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/4019HALF/CONTD:RPT FR PTD RE RESTITUTION ASSESSMENT & ATTENDANCE IN CLASSES/DOPU:PRETRIALDIVERSION/

/CAL  JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPARTMENT 624 AT THEVIC CENTER COURTHOUSE/JAVS/X: ADA CALDERON-PENALOZA AND DPD HORNER PRESENT CLOSING ARGUMENTS,/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: GUILTY VERDICT ON COUNT 1 /X: ADA CALDERON-PENALOZA DISMISSES COUNT 2 AND COUNT 3 DUE TO THEINTEREST OF JUSTICE,/TWS/X: ALL ADMITTED EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT, TO BE DELIVERED TO ROOM 101 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE,/CONTD:SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPARTMENT 624, CIVIC CENTER COURTHOUSE/DOP/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPARTMENT 624 AT THE CIVIC CENTER COURTHOUSE,/JAVS/X: ADA CALDERON-PENALOZA FILES PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENSE'S REQUEST FOR ACCIDENT JURY INSTRUCTION UNDER CALCRIM 3404IN OPEN COURT,/X:THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF ACQUITTAL OF COUNTS 1, 2 AND 3  PURSUANT TO PC1118,1,/X:THE PEOPLE OPPOSE THE MOTION,/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:CASE PROCEEDS TO DEFENDANT'S CASE,/X: DPD HORNERFILES DEFENSE'S PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTION AND OPPOSITION TO SPECIFIC INSTRUCTION REQUESTED BY THE PROSECUTION IN OPEN COURT,/X:THE PEOPLE REST AND THE DEFENSE REST,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE DEFENSE CASE/
